```{r}
library(magick)
```

```{r}
# read original PNG
img <- image_read("./prius2/output/suitability/Climate_only/Acacia_mearnsii.png")

# add text in the top-left corner
img2 <- image_annotate(
  img,
  text      = "climate-only",
  gravity   = "northwest",   # top-left
  location  = "+10+10",      # pixel offset right/down from top-left
  size      = 20,            # font size in points
  color     = "black",
  font      = "Arial"
)

# write to a new file
image_write(img2,
            path = "./prius2/output/suitability/me_test/Acacia_mearnsii.png",
            format = "png")
```
